The '''Rakatan temple''' was a structure built on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] by the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]]. It was similar in appearance to other [[Rakatan temple]]s, such as the [[Temple of the Ancients]] on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]]. The native [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] were said to remember the Rakata only as gods, and protected the temple with their lives. It served as neutral ground for the planet's various clans.

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Noghri used the temple to store the [[Scientific Instrument Package]] they salvaged from the wreckage of the ''[[Gahenna]]''. They stashed the SIP in a chamber protected by [[poison hyperdart]]s. [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Rii'ke En]] attempted to infiltrate the temple, but he and his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] were killed by its protectors. [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Bly/Legends|CC-5052]] later finished En's mission—with dubious help from [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]—and absconded with the SIP after thwarting the temple's [[Battle droid/Legends|assault droids]] and overcoming its defenses.
